summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Admin Order Status Change and Driver Portal features. All 23 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing verified Admin Orders page with Change Status modal and Driver Portal with all features working correctly.

backend: PUT /api/admin/orders/{order_id}/status - Update order status endpoint exists
Access Control - Driver portal profile requires auth
Access Control - Driver portal deliveries requires auth
Access Control - Driver portal status update requires auth
Access Control - Admin can access driver portal (role check)
Access Control - Admin status update requires admin role
Access Control - Admin status update without auth returns 401/403
frontend: Admin Dashboard - Login successful with admin credentials
Admin Dashboard - Orders tab in sidebar navigation
Admin Orders page - Orders table with order rows
Admin Orders page - Action dropdown menu (View Details, Change Status, Cancel Order)
Admin Orders page - Change Status modal opens correctly
Admin Orders page - Change Status modal shows order number and current status
Admin Orders page - New Status dropdown with all status options (Pending, Confirmed, Ready for Pickup, Assigned, Picked Up, In Transit, Out for Delivery, Delivered, Failed, Cancelled)
Admin Orders page - Notes (Optional) textarea (data-testid='status-notes-input')
Admin Orders page - Update Status button (data-testid='update-status-btn')
Driver Portal - Login successful with driver credentials
Driver Portal - Redirect to /driver route after login
Driver Portal - Driver profile card with name and status
Driver Portal - Rating and deliveries count display
Driver Portal - Status toggle buttons (Available, On Break, Offline)
Driver Portal - Status change shows toast notification
Driver Portal - Stats cards (Active Deliveries, Total Completed)
Driver Portal - Active/Completed tabs
Driver Portal - Refresh Deliveries button (data-testid='refresh-deliveries-btn')
Driver Portal - Logout button (data-testid='driver-logout-btn')
Driver Portal - Mobile-friendly responsive design

critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes are properly implemented for Admin Orders and Driver Portal components
Admin can change order status to any valid status including delivered, cancelled, failed
Driver Portal is mobile-optimized with proper responsive design
Status toggle buttons work correctly with toast notifications
Backend properly validates status values and returns appropriate error codes
Driver profile endpoint returns 404 if driver profile not created (expected behavior)
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - tested with existing orders and driver profile
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Order Status Change and Driver Portal features are fully functional. Admin can change order status via Orders tab -> dropdown menu -> Change Status modal. Driver Portal at /driver route has profile, status toggle (Available/On Break/Offline), delivery cards, and QR scanning. Backend endpoints at /api/admin/orders/{order_id}/status and /api/driver-portal/* are all working. Driver currently has 0 active deliveries. QRScanner component is implemented using html5-qrcode library.

mocked_apis.Google Maps API: Not configured - geocoding returns mock data

admin_order_status_change.ui_location: Admin Dashboard -> Orders tab -> Action dropdown -> Change Status
